violations.description: Preventing contamination by employees. — --Employee observed using same pair of single-use gloves for more than one task. Food employee was observed touching his clothing with gloved hands and did not change his gloves. Gloves should be changed after handling items not related to food preparation.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Walk-in cooler shelving units were found dirty during inspection. The inside of both blizzard tables also were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Lids for to-go cups were found store in dirty bins. Single use items should be stored in a clean location.
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
